---
title: "Project 1: Data Analysis Example"
description: "A simple data analysis project using Python"
author: "Kshithy"
date: "2023-01-01"
categories: [python, data]
---

## Overview

This project demonstrates basic data analysis with Python.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Sample data
data = {'x': [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'y': [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Plot
plt.plot(df['x'], df['y'])
plt.title('Sample Plot')
plt.show()
```

## Conclusion

This shows how to use Python for data visualization.
